km.Little Saxham, Suffolk, England: លីtល សាចហាម, ស៊ូfប៉ូលក, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.Little Saxham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruario於1154年出生在英國素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆。他於1179年與Mrs. Richard de Bruario在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1190年之後。

zh-hans.Little Saxham, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruario于1154年出生在英国素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆。他于1179年与Mrs. Richard de Bruario在英国英格兰素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1190年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruario was born in 1154, in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England. He married Mrs. Richard de Bruario in 1179, in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died after 1190.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruario est né en 1154, à Little Saxham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Il a épousé Mrs. Richard de Bruario en 1179, à Little Saxham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé après 1190.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruario wurde 1154 in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England geboren. Er hat 1179 in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Richard de Bruario geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1190.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruario è nato il nel 1154 nel Little Saxham, Suffolk, England. Lui sposato Mrs. Richard de Bruario nel 1179, nel Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1190.

ja.Little Saxham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクリットル サクスハム
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruarioは1154年にイギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムで生まれた。1179年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムでMrs. Richard de Bruarioと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1190年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruario(은)는 1154년 영국 수폴크 리틀 사스함에서 태어났다. 그는 1179년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 사스함에서 Mrs. Richard de Bruario(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1190년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruario nasceu em 1154, em Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Richard de Bruario em 1179, em Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu após 1190.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruario родился в 1154 г. в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Richard de Bruario в 1179 г. в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 1190 г.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Bruario nació en 1154, en Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con Mrs. Richard de Bruario en 1179, en Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1190.
